creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mva
Date: Sat Jan 12 15:00:39 2013
New Revision: 310273
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310273

Log:
  - Update to 2.4.11
  
  PR:		ports/175106
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/print/ft2demos/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/print/ft2demos/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/print/ft2demos/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/ft2demos/Makefile	Sat Jan 12 14:49:11 2013	(r310272)
+++ head/print/ft2demos/Makefile	Sat Jan 12 15:00:39 2013	(r310273)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	ft2demos
-# Date created:		12 April 2001
-# Whom:			KANOU Hiroki <kanou@khdd.net>
-#
+# Created by: KANOU Hiroki <kanou@khdd.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ft2demos
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.9
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.11
 CATEGORIES=	print
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/freetype/freetype-demos/${PORTVERSION} \
 		RINGSERVER/graphics/freetype/freetype2
@@ -15,7 +11,7 @@ MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Demo programs for FreeType2
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${FREETYPE_WRKSRC}/config.mk:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2:build
-LIB_DEPENDS=	freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+LIB_DEPENDS=	freetype:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
 
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_XORG=	xext

Modified: head/print/ft2demos/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/ft2demos/distinfo	Sat Jan 12 14:49:11 2013	(r310272)
+++ head/print/ft2demos/distinfo	Sat Jan 12 15:00:39 2013	(r310273)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (ft2demos-2.4.9.tar.bz2) = 163748
+SHA256 (ft2demos-2.4.11.tar.bz2) = 49cc6c45542cc39cca0d9135b865fab428b1f9805b46c22fd848528f51c76075
+SIZE (ft2demos-2.4.11.tar.bz2) = 164608
